name: cde-data-movement
title: Catalog Data Movement
description: CDE-authored dashboard, editable in Pentaho CDE — cross-platform data movement (GB) by source, destination & integration over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: GbBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1) AS src, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection c WHERE c.orig_namespace<>c.dest_namespace AND c.bytes_moved>0 GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(c.bytes_moved)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: GbByDest
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) AS dst, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection c WHERE c.orig_namespace<>c.dest_namespace AND c.bytes_moved>0 GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(c.bytes_moved)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: GbByIntegration
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE c.bytes_moved>0 AND j.integration<>'Unknown' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
